commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add infrastructure detection, polished loader, auth gating, and saved history

- Infrastructure detection: Query Overpass API for universities, hospitals,
  government offices near assessment locations. These are treated as absolute
  blockers (score < 15, not_viable) by Gemini AI analysis.
- Assess loader: Replace simple spinner with 8-step animated progress loader
  (SVG ring, step checklist, progress bar) matching recommend page quality.
- Auth gating: Middleware now redirects unauthenticated users from /assess,
  /recommend, /dashboard to Auth0 login with returnTo support.
- Saved history: Assessments and recommendations saved to localStorage keyed
  by Auth0 user ID. Dashboard rebuilt to show history with filter tabs,
  score badges, and relative timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Release v0.3.2

commit.message:
Staging → Main (#190)

* feat: add authenticated E2E tests for full organizer-participant booking flow

Add Playwright auth setup with seed accounts and a full happy-path spec:
organizer creates/publishes event → participant books → self-checks-in →
organizer verifies check-in on dashboard. Also fix pre-existing failures
in auth, home, and navigation specs (strict mode violations, splash screen overlay).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: organizer participant management — manually add participants and set paid/reserved/pending status

Organizers can now add participants directly from the event dashboard,
either by searching existing users or entering a name+contact for walk-ins.
Includes inline status dropdown, RLS policy for organizer inserts, and
migration for new booking columns (added_by, manual_status, manual_name, manual_contact).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: organizer auth check — compare against organizer_profiles.id, not users.id

events.organizer_id references organizer_profiles.id, so the auth check
was always failing. Now looks up the organizer profile by user_id first.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: status dropdown clipped by table overflow-hidden

Removed overflow-hidden from desktop table container so the manual
status dropdown can render outside the table bounds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: disable participant management for completed events, fix loader timing

- Hide "Add Participant" button when event is completed
- Show static status badge instead of dropdown for completed events
- Fix loader disappearing before data refreshes by not clearing loading
  state (component re-renders with new data naturally)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf: defer Leaflet loading and dynamic import waitlist modal

Gate StravaShowcaseRouteMap with IntersectionObserver so the Leaflet
chunk (~44 KiB) only loads when scrolled into view instead of on
initial page hydration. Dynamic import OrganizerWaitlistModal since
it's a modal behind a 3s delay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: enforce max capacity when organizer adds participants

Count active bookings + non-cancelled companions before allowing
a new participant to be added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: status dropdown stuck in loading — use useTransition to track refresh

Local state persisted across re-renders since router.refresh() doesn't
unmount the component. Now uses useTransition so isPending tracks when
the Server Component finishes re-rendering with new data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: disable add participant button at capacity, use optimistic status updates

- Wire isFull prop through ParticipantsSection to disable button when at max capacity
- Replace useTransition with optimistic updates for status dropdown — each dropdown
  updates independently without blocking others
- Show "Event is at full capacity" text when button is disabled

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: convert waitlist modal to inline section (#181)

* refactor: convert organizer waitlist modal to inline homepage section

Replace the auto-popup OrganizerWaitlistModal with an inline
OrganizerWaitlistSection that renders naturally in the homepage scroll
flow. Removes the distracting 3-second delay popup behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: inject organizer_waitlist section when missing from CMS data

The CMS database has pre-configured sections that don't include the
new organizer_waitlist key, so it never rendered. Now the section is
auto-injected after pioneer_counter if absent from the CMS list.

Switch to type='system' badges so the section always renders.

in a bar above the items table. Much clearer visual hierarchy and flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement night mode: warmest color, minimum brightness, with scheduling

Night mode now actually works end-to-end:
- Activating (via MCP, remote, or schedule) pushes 2000K / brightness 1
  to lights and pauses circadian
- Deactivating resumes circadian
- Circadian engine skips rooms in night mode
- Built-in motion uses night mode values when active (dimmer, shorter timeout)
- Time-based scheduler auto-activates/deactivates per room start/end times
- Manual deactivation suppresses re-activation for current schedule window

commit.message:
Fix Theorem E proof and add verification scripts

- Rewrite Theorem E proof: the original claimed g(v) = (1/32)v(v^2-B^2)(v^2-C^2)
  but the correct centred form is (1/8)(v-A)(v^2-B^2)(v^2-C^2) with A=r^2+1.
  The function is NOT odd, so the S=chi(2)*S argument was invalid.
  New proof uses correct character sum identity S=-T with computational
  verification (11,475 tests, zero failures).
- Add Remark on L-polynomial structure: L_p(A_r,T) is a polynomial in T^2
  at inert primes, consistent with real multiplication by Q(sqrt(2)).
- Add scripts/verify_theorem_E.py (Python character sum verification)
- Add magma/verify_theorem_E.txt (Magma L-polynomial verification)
- Replace placeholder email with real address
- Update computational verification section and discussion

commit.message:
feat: allow duplicate-address admin registrations with warning (#167) (#178)

## Summary

- Drops the unique constraint on `apartment_key` for active
registrations, allowing admins to create duplicate-address registrations
- Admin registration and waitlist assignment flows now return a
`DUPLICATE_ADDRESS_WARNING` (409) when the target apartment already has
active registrations; only proceeds after explicit `confirmDuplicate`
confirmation
- Public switch flow updated to randomly select one existing
registration to replace when an address has multiple active
registrations (keeping all others unchanged)
- Audit trail captures `duplicate_address_warning_shown` and
`duplicate_address_confirmed` events with full context
- Frontend shows an orange warning banner with existing registration
details and a distinct "Confirm Duplicate" button in both admin
registration and waitlist assignment dialogs
- Added i18n translations (da/en) for all new duplicate warning strings

Closes #167

## Test plan

- [x] All 403 existing tests pass (285 API + 118 web)
- [x] Lint passes with no new errors
- [x] Build completes successfully
- [ ] Verify admin can create duplicate registration: first attempt
shows warning, second attempt with confirm proceeds
- [ ] Verify admin waitlist assignment shows same duplicate warning when
apartment already registered
- [ ] Verify public switch with multi-registration address replaces
exactly one registration randomly
- [ ] Verify audit log captures warning_shown and confirmed events

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VuTXSQ767bh2etBphgL8j9

- Performance: already using requestAnimationFrame, viewport culling

commit.message:
Fix combined DD and win months: use deals data + MT5 DD values

- Rewrote computeCombinedByDate() to build combined curve from DEALS
  data (trade-level granularity) instead of downsampled balance curves.
  Apps Script halves balance curve points to fit 40K char limit, losing
  drawdown valleys. Deals data preserves every trade.
- Combined DD KPI now uses average of individual MT5-parsed maxDDPct
  values (real equity drawdown) instead of the diluted combined curve DD.
  Shows worst individual DD in subtitle for risk context.
- fetchDriveBalanceCurves() now also re-fetches reports with heavily
  downsampled curves (>100 trades but <100 curve points).

commit.message:
Fix face mesh dye brightness oscillation with constant-rate injection

Replace variable noise-modulated face dye injection with constant
vec3f(0.01) white injection. Any variation in injection rate or color
caused cyclical brightness oscillation amplified by advection/dissipation.
The display shader applies palette coloring via luminance conversion,
so noise-colored injection was never visible in final output.

Also: remove T1-T5 test presets, tune dye noise convergence, add debug
tools, change default preset to face ghost1.

  extraction with del+gc.collect(), scale only on ~14K germ cells
- Full pipeline: QC, clustering, cell type annotation, germ cell analysis
- XX pseudotime with meiosis gene dynamics (STRA8, SYCP3, DMC1)
- PRC1.6 brake analysis (PCGF6, RNF2, MAX)
- XX vs XY differential expression and temporal dynamics
- Pathway scoring (RA signaling, meiotic onset, PRC1.6 brake)
- 19 figures + DE results CSV + germ cell h5ad saved
